updatedAt: <ISO timestamp — set from command output, e.g. date -u>
note: Machine-written volatile state for a drive loop. Policy lives in the versioned policy file / SKILL.md. Update only from command output or VERBATIM human input (quote the human's words with a timestamp) — never from the agent's own paraphrased recollection. Derivable facts (CI status, HEAD sha, review lists) are NOT stored here — derive them fresh each cycle. All arrays below start EMPTY in a live bootstrap; field shapes are documented in _shapes, which is reference-only and must never be read as data.

userDecisions[].decision: <verbatim-ish record of an explicit human decision>

findingLedger.<pr>.openFindings[].disposition: <dispatched|deferred-to-issue-N|absorbed-by-invariant|fixed> — NEVER delete entries; update disposition/fixCommit so per-round class history survives for the >=3-recurrence trigger

current.phase: <human-readable: what was last done, what is awaited>
